recommendations.title: The True Cost
recommendations.overview: Film from Andrew Morgan.  The True Cost is a documentary film exploring the impact of fashion on people and the planet.

recommendations.title: Interstellar: Nolan's Odyssey
recommendations.overview: A look behind the lens of Christopher Nolan's space epic.

recommendations.title: After Porn Ends
recommendations.overview: Documentary examining what happens to some of the biggest names in the history of the adult entertainment industry after they leave the business and try and live "normal" lives.

recommendations.title: Bombshell: The Hedy Lamarr Story
recommendations.overview: The life and career of the hailed Hollywood movie star and underappreciated genius inventor, Hedy Lamarr.

recommendations.title: Have a Good Trip: Adventures in Psychedelics
recommendations.overview: Celebrities recall their most mind-bending trips via animations, reenactments and more in this comedic documentary exploring the story of psychedelics.

recommendations.title: Spielberg
recommendations.overview: A documentary on the life and career of one of the most influential film directors of all time, Steven Spielberg.

recommendations.title: Moonage Daydream
recommendations.overview: A cinematic odyssey featuring never-before-seen footage exploring David Bowie's creative and musical journey.

recommendations.title: Money Heist: The Phenomenon
recommendations.overview: A documentary on why 'Money Heist' sparked a wave of enthusiasm around the world for a lovable group of thieves and their professor.

recommendations.title: The Remarkable Life of Ibelin
recommendations.overview: The secret life of a young World of Warcraft gamer is vividly reimagined when his online friends contact his family after his death.

recommendations.title: The Social Dilemma
recommendations.overview: This documentary-drama hybrid explores the dangerous human impact of social networking, with tech experts sounding the alarm on their own creations.
